prompt: Photorealistic mixed media collage street portrait sketch [OF A PERSON WITH A PHOTO]. Use the uploaded photo as an exact reference for the personality. Fully preserve the face, facial features, skin texture, proportions, hairstyle, and recognizability. Medium close-up, slight low angle, looking straight into the camera, soft smile with closed mouth. Clothing: loose white oversize t-shirt, tucked into light blue wide-leg high-waisted jeans, minimalist gold hoop earrings, concise modern style. Background: modern sunny street of a metropolis with futuristic glass buildings, stylish coffee shops, designer boutiques, wide sidewalks, urban greenery, modern architecture, reflections in glass facades, and a rich blue sky. Atmosphere of a warm summer day, lively, airy, and inspiring mood. Strong manual processing in mixed media style: bold drawn contour lines in bright pink and aquamarine colors, emphasizing the silhouette, abstract brush strokes, free marker swirls, semi-transparent torn paper fragments, handwritten strokes, dynamic scribbles, and graphic cutouts. Composition is energetic, yet neat and balanced. Light scanning texture, poster grain, delicate chromatic aberration, slightly frayed collage edges, feeling of a premium printed art poster. The character remains maximally realistic and sharp, while mixed media elements look hand-applied. Mood: modern, stylish, youthful, premium, bright, trendy, and scroll-stopping.
